expected_verdict.failure_class: Data leakage through imputation (compound: imputation-before-split AND target-in-imputer)
expected_verdict.root_cause_summary: KNNImputer is fit on the full dataframe before train/test split; target column is still present in the dataframe at fit time. Both conditions are simultaneously true and both must be fixed.

expected_fix.shape_of_fix: Drop TARGET and ID columns up front; call train_test_split BEFORE imputer is fit; fit KNNImputer on X_train only; apply the fitted imputer.transform() to X_test.

acceptance_checks: Within 3 minutes, agent identifies at least one hypothesis containing 'imputation' or 'leakage' with rank 1 or 2
Agent reads prepare_data.py as one of the first 3 tool calls
Verdict confidence >= 0.85 on the imputation hypothesis
After fix, agent reports metric_delta where AUC_LR drops by at least 0.08
PR body contains all 5 canonical dossier sections
